{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=A thousand-faced cube that took ten years to make. After the cube committee disqualified it, the creator made it into a sphere out of anger.
|affct=TECH
|hard=DEF
|source=Divine Chaos Chest (0.2%)
|color=purple
|earth=7
|water=7
|fire=7
|wind=5
|form=Mecha
|element=Wind
|realm=Kemet
|orangehard=RUSH
}}
